# CWE-267 — Privilege Defined With Unsafe Actions (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-267-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type Review struct {
	ID     uint
	Status string
}

// Safe: reviewer role limited to updating review records in the database.
func ReviewerUpdate(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	if c.GetString("role") != "reviewer" {
		c.JSON(403, gin.H{"error": "forbidden"})
		return
	}
	id := c.Param("id")
	var rev Review
	db.First(&rev, id)
	rev.Status = c.PostForm("status")
	db.Save(&rev)
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"id": rev.ID})
}
